code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let token = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let token = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      match list.index_of(remaining, m)
      when Some(idx)
        remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
      when None
        remaining = []
      end
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
  let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
  let total = sorted.len()
  let take = if k < total
    k
  else
    total
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < take
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
